headline: Is Pool Corporation (POOL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is POOL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Pool Corporation on Valueinvestorsclub.com by levcap65. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on POOL. Pool Corporation’s share was trading at $210.74 as of March 17th. POOL’s trailing and forward P/E were 19.42 and 21.79 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.
